OUTWARD MOBILITY
OUTWARD MOBILITY
Sri Eshwar facilitates its students to explore academic opportunities outside India through Semester Abroad Programs, International Internships, Global Immersion and Cultural Exchange Programs. In today’s seamlessly interconnected world it becomes important that the students are provided with an ecosystem for global collaboration, interactions and exchange of ideas which is offered to the students through our Outward Mobility programs.
SEMESTER ABROAD PROGRAM
As an autonomous institution, Sri Eshwar encourages interested students to study one or two semesters in a globally reputed overseas institution. This blended degree program gives an opportunity to the students to study the overseas curriculum, experience different teaching learning processes, gain global perspectives, exposure to diverse cultures, and expand professional networks.
After completion of the semester in the overseas institution, the student will return to Sri Eshwar to continue and complete his degree program. The credits earned by the student through the overseas courses will be transferred and added to the overall credits earned by the student at Sri Eshwar and considered for award of degree.
SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY
SRI ESHWARITES @ MALAYA UNIVERSITY
Advantages of Semester Abroad Program
Experience international learning and culture
Enhance career prospects in India and abroad
Explore opportunities for higher studies
Enhance admission prospects in overseas universities
Boost self confidence
APPLICATION PROCESS
Who can apply for SAP?
Students should have a minimum CGPA of 8.0 with no standing arrears.
Year of Study
For undergraduate students - 4 semesters should have been completed
For Postgraduate students - 2 should have been completed
Language Proficiency
Based on university requirements, students must take the English proficiency tests like TOEFL, IELTS, or other accepted language assessments
Passport
Students must possess a valid passport for the entire duration of the program.
How to apply?
Request
for a one–on-one counseling session by sending an email to cir@sece.ac.in.
Schedule
the session based on the mutual convenience of yourself and CIR coordinator.
Decide
if you wish to enroll in SAP.
Submit
the required forms/transcripts duly signed, within the application deadline.
Your most recent academic transcripts
Two letters of recommendation from professors who can vouch for your academic abilities and potential.
Detailed Resume(CV) highlighting academic achievements, extracurricular activities, and relevant project details.
Transcript of Language Proficiency tests such as TOEFL or IELTS, where required.
Attend
an Interview. (applicable for some universities)
You will be contacted to attend an in-person/virtual interview (if required) within 1 to 2 weeks of submission of application.
Receive
your admission intimation (if selected) through email.
The application deadline for each program will vary. Check the program-specific deadlines with the CIR.
Got admitted! What’s next?
Plan
your travel arrangements
Apply for the necessary visa (if applicable) well in advance.
Check any health requirements, such as vaccinations, and fulfill them before departure.
Attend Orientation
and Pre-Departure session conducted by the university.
A mandatory session covering topics such as cultural adjustment, health and safety, and academic expectations will be conducted by CIR team.
Contact CIR office
at any point, if you have questions in the application process.
Good luck with your application! 
CIR will always be with you to support you in every step of the way.
INTERNATIONAL INTERNSHIPS
We strongly believe that overseas internship opportunities will give global exposure and further enhance the knowledge, skills and confidence level of our students. We highly encourage our students to enroll for internship experiences abroad to propel their careers. We provide our students with overseas internship opportunities in various countries for a duration of 1 to 3 months.
Students interested in International Internships may contact the CIR.
Download the International Internship Request form and mail to
cir@sece.ac.in
.
SUMMER/WINTER SCHOOLS
A short-term visit to overseas institutions would provide students with an opportunity to participate in a course on an emerging technology, while also experiencing the campus infrastructure and culture through conducted tours. The CIR facilitates 1 to 3-week immersion programs for its students at leading overseas institutions during the summer/winter holidays. The following are some of the overseas institutions with which the CIR has an agreement for Summer/Winter School opportunities.
Students interested in Summer/Winter Schools programs may contact the CIR.
Download the Summer/Winter Request Schools request form and mail to cir@sece.ac.in.
